name: Tom Perez
subject: DOUG JONES! ﻿
body:
Democrats won BIG tonight!
---
**Doug Jones just won Alabama!
Make a contribution right now to help Democrats win in every state.

**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523e7c/4067b0a/4e9449c6f/7e5aa3d5/3430614399/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/ready-for-2018-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171212_tp_nd&source=em_20171212_tp_nd&refcode=em_20171212_tp_nd")****
Derek, we did it! Doug Jones has won Alabama's special Senate election and is headed to Washington to become the state's next U.S. Senator.

This is a victory for hardworking Alabama families and for Democrats nationwide. Hundreds of thousands of supporters from all over the country rallied to make phone calls, send text messages, share social media posts, and donate whatever they could to help Doug get out the vote today.

And we got the job done. Together.

We've proven all year long that we can win anywhere when we invest in our state parties, mobilize the grassroots, and employ all of our best practices, tools, and technologies to help our candidates win.

We have all of the momentum heading into the new year -- but we know that Trump and his Republicans are going to fight tooth and nail to keep control of Congress.

Tonight, we proved yet again that we can beat the GOP -- with your help, we can take the fight to them in all 50 states.

**Pitch in $10 or more to help Democrats prepare for victory up and down the ticket in 2018.**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be divided evenly between the DNC and Doug Jones for Senate._

[ QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523e7c/4067b0a/4e9449c6f/7e5aa3d2/3430614399/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-ready-for-2018?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20171212_tp_nd&source=em_20171212_tp_nd&refcode=em_20171212_tp_nd")

name: mindy@dscc.org
subject: while we wait for Alabama election results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
From the start, it's been clear that Doug Jones is a tremendous candidate and his history of service -- including bringing two KKK members responsible for the Birmingham Church Bombing to justice -- is nothing short of inspiring.
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20171212-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Friend --

I just got off the phone with Tracey Lewis, the DSCC's Deputy Executive Director, an experienced, powerhouse organizer who has been on the ground as part of the Doug Jones team in Alabama.

From the start, it's been clear that Doug Jones is a tremendous candidate and his history of service -- including bringing two KKK members responsible for the Birmingham Church Bombing to justice -- is nothing short of inspiring.

But what has really been incredible is to see Doug's team build an army of fired up grassroots supporters who truly made this special election a race.

Now, Alabama is a state that hasn't elected a Democrat to the Senate since 1992. But that didn't stop DSCC supporters.

You looked at this race, you looked at the candidates, and you said "This is a fight worth fighting -- and I want to be on the right side of history."

And thanks to that spirit, that support -- the GOP found themselves dealing with a true race today.

Now we'll wait for the results to come in -- and either way we will be thankful for the incredible campaign Doug Jones built, for all of his supporters, and DSCC members like you.

Thank you for standing up for what's right. Thank you for standing with us in this fight,

Mindy Myers
Executive Director, DSCC

**[Contribute](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20171212-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. Peter,

Want to get exclusive updates about EMILY's List candidates, endorsements, and the latest breaking news?

We're launching a new text messaging program just for the EMILY's List community that will help you stay up to date on the best ways to help elect more pro-choice Democratic women.

Plus, you'll get to hear from me -- I'm Meg. And I'm really excited about the opportunity we have to elect more women in 2018.

**[Sign up to get texts from EMILY's List. It's the best way to get urgent updates about our candidates and the ways you can help.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6f09/24c69fd9/15295759b/1890abf0/1239112668/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20171212_email_SMSLaunch?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Sign+up+to+get+texts+from+EMILYs+List+It&utm_campaign=WQENEL18N_digital_email_20171212_SMSLaunch_inact&source=WQENEL18N_digital_email_20171212_SMSLaunch_inact")**

You can expect one to two texts a week only on the most important topics -- I promise, "Meg from EMILY's List" does not send spam.

And we'll share some updates with our texting community before anybody else gets them. You won't want to miss out.

There's no better way to get ready for the election year ahead.

**Sign up to be the first to get breaking news and exclusive updates texted to you:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Text-Me-Please](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6f09/24c69fd9/15295759b/1890abf1/1239112668/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20171212_email_SMSLaunch?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgTextMePlease&utm_campaign=WQENEL18N_digital_email_20171212_SMSLaunch_inact&source=WQENEL18N_digital_email_20171212_SMSLaunch_inact")**

Thanks,

Meg DiMartino
Digital Assistant, EMILY's List

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Let's keep the momentum going!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3230/9e00690/419f7007/2403d12f/1780725727/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em17_171212_AL2_fnd_gq_ful__AG&source=em17_171212_AL2_fnd_gq_ful__AG")
Hello,

Tonight, Alabama showed the whole country what happens when people put doing what's right over partisanship -- and I want to congratulate Doug Jones and his campaign on this momentous win.

Many had their doubts about his success. But the commitment from grassroots supporters across the country these past few months and the bottom-up campaign he ran paid off in a critical win for the Democratic Party.

**And your support could make all the difference right here in Florida too.**

If you share my belief that we need an everyday Floridian to be our Governor -- someone who will fight for our students and teachers, put working people back at the center of our economy, and demand health care as a right for all and not a privilege for the few -- then help us build the foundation we need by creating a sustainable base of monthly donors now.

**Will you make your first monthly contribution today?**
[Yes, I can chip in $5 monthly](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3230/9e00690/419f7007/2403d12e/1780725727/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-al-1?utm_campaign=em17_171212_AL2_fnd_gq_ful__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em17_171212_AL2_fnd_gq_ful__AG&recurring=1&amount=5&utm_content=2+-+Yes+I+can+chip+in+5+monthly")
[No, but I can chip in $15 today](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3230/9e00690/419f7007/2403d121/1780725727/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-al-1?utm_campaign=em17_171212_AL2_fnd_gq_ful__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em17_171212_AL2_fnd_gq_ful__AG&amount=15&utm_content=3+-+No+but+I+can+chip+in+15+today")
We need to keep this progressive momentum going through Election Day 2018, and your donation will help make every month until then count. As Governor, I will put people over politics, but I can only get there with your help.

Thank you,

Andrew

[Donate](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3230/9e00690/419f7007/2403d120/1780725727/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-al-1?utm_campaign=em17_171212_AL2_fnd_gq_ful__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em17_171212_AL2_fnd_gq_ful__AG&utm_content=4+-+Donate")

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Amazing news in Alabama - thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:

name: Jess O'Connell
subject: We won in Alabama. Now we can win anywhere.
body:
When Democrats fight in every state, there is no limit to what we can accomplish.
---
**Doug Jones won the Alabama special election!
Make a contribution right now to help Democrats win in every state.

**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523e79/4067b0a/4e8794e75/7e5a9b90/4170660028/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Ready-for-20181?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171213_joc_v2s4&source=em_20171213_joc_v2s4&refcode=em_20171213_joc_v2s4")****
I'm shocked, Derek.

Last night, Doug Jones pulled off a historic win in Alabama -- a red state that hasn't elected a Democratic senator in more than 20 years.

This victory didn't happen just because Roy Moore is unfit for office. It happened because Alabamians organized relentlessly in support of Doug -- and it made the difference in this race.

If Democrats can win a statewide race in Alabama, we can win anywhere. Now it's time to carry this momentum into 2018.

**[Chip in $10 or more right now to say you're ready to elect Democrats in every state in 2018.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523e79/4067b0a/4e8794e75/7e5a9b9e/4170660028/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Ready-for-20181?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+Chip+in+10+or+more+right+now+to+say+your&utm_campaign=em_20171213_joc_v2s4&source=em_20171213_joc_v2s4&refcode=em_20171213_joc_v2s4")**

Democrats stepped up big time in Alabama to help Doug Jones win this critical race. Here is some of what made last night's win possible:

* Organizing on the ground to spread the word about Doug and get Democrats out to vote.
* Tens of thousands of contributions from grassroots donors across the country helped Doug get his message out far and wide.
* More than one million text messages sent to voters to give them the information they needed to get to the polls.

Here's the deal, Derek: Alabama doesn't have to be an outlier. When Democrats fight in every state, there is no limit to what we can accomplish.

**Contribute $10 or more today to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in all 50 states. The only way we win is if we stand together.**

name: The White House
subject: The military’s biggest raise in 8 years
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bada0df85b6cb168c64d639ebd34c5416ebf304b291390ce24a1934b7a6da71cf3b16847ad09dd16ee429048eb1fc3d9f0d9ba747d12e76b

The military’s biggest raise in 8 years

President Donald J. Trump has signed the National Defense Authorization Act for fiscal year 2018, which approves one of the largest defense spending increases since the Reagan presidency to help rebuild America’s Armed Forces.

Here is a quick list of what the NDAA does for America's military:

- Increases rather than shrinks the size of our forces for the first time in 7 years
- Ensures that our military remains the world’s preeminent fighting force, which is vital to the Administration’s peace-through-strength strategy
- Authorizes funding to allow for the continued defeat of ISIS and cover critical missile defense capabilities to confront the threat posed by North Korea
- Takes concrete steps to rebuild U.S. military readiness
- Approves a 2.4 percent pay raise for our troops—the largest in 8 years

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bada0df85b6cb168b4e3e093f4942b1e9c7277da2074a2e0b37e16e47d6a9a7f50cb4bfd02e0cec0f97c072c061888e7797e181902308d94
Read more about how the NDAA will strengthen America’s military for the year ahead.

Today: The closing argument for tax cuts

Tax reform is in the midst of a crucial week as members of the House and Senate negotiate final details of a bill to pass and send the President.

The White House believes it’s important to allow this process to play out, ensuring that Congress arrives at the best possible solution for all Americans. To help support this effort, President Trump will deliver a major speech today, highlighting real middle-class families and what tax relief means for their bottom lines.

Among the biggest changes: more tax-free income, a larger child tax credit, and lower rates.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bada0df85b6cb1683deacee33f45d32d25009f41378e01f11aba25af6e7909bd8362e7793e8a220a9811df5a89d5b54727e4a8c6c7f083b3
Watch the President’s speech live at 3 p.m. EST.

Bonus: A majority of governors back tax reform, and 21 of them
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bada0df85b6cb1688c4ad37e4b439ebf355155c02a29a46418e90e6f8b0cb7824aff96b1da22b7e963be175a96eaecc008983565d5773dc9
recently sent Congress a letter saying so.

Home for the holidays

Even as the Administration presses forward with an aggressive policy agenda, it’s important during this time of year to step back, give thanks, and appreciate what is most important in life.

A few highlights from how the First and Second Families have been celebrating thus far:

- Second Lady Karen Pence gives a video tour of
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bada0df85b6cb168dee9c85a36c02a1ebce0a3120712c8ffd7b522822530cfc736f82bffb89026b3b01fc74de27ee8bbd20aef67a596d1a2
Christmas decorations at the Vice President’s residence
- First Lady Melania Trump recaps her visit
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bada0df85b6cb168c1269a1274bc65c0ff7389b7751c47bf8037b62f8c0dfcff7c7facdf527273ad9d664ee3532e0a2d124fa372ca778e44
to Children’s National Medical Center in Washington last week
- President Trump says “we are proud to stand with the Jewish people” in a message to
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bada0df85b6cb168b4a6991139d19a41a3960da7a6173621842b1d900f95a65985c045f6ce44be7666f3ffa42d976eac473408d5d3f00d57
mark the beginning of Hanukkah

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump signs H.R. 2810, the National Defense Authorization Act for the Fiscal Year of 2018 | December 12, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump will have lunch with bicamerel tax conferees. Later, the President will participate in the swearing-in of Judge Gregory Katsas to the Circuit Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia.

SPECIAL NOTE

The Summer 2018 White House Internship Program is now open for applications through January 12. Read more about the program
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bada0df85b6cb1680628d91a5041085205a4b45cea78925a2f26c552e76e39cec6f0c85722f6bd00f5c30e44fd89e7457553ca9f1acdb503
here.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bada0df85b6cb1689e07bab9d58fbcf21c2f42e55ae24167f79adba8e6cab5c36981317efbc8e6a6bdbb6063cbed3ae3b8f4afe8efebabf2
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bada0df85b6cb1680c65d0d91fbaf45b3474d7785a00481b7942946d49c15ea18558ef8536c271fa32ac6fd99188872016da5141638456e7
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4c40aa1b856abcfdeac4f5ae4d81c623ab73ab0e59caea54679070d4651c7cda14e50ed865f1d72c0ddf984b2f494da6f

name: Team Cooper
subject: Virginia, Georgia...Alabama?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Democrats across the country are fired up -- and right here in North Carolina we have the opportunity to break the Republican supermajority in the 2018 elections.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120316e/2fde7c66/4738135f/15698097/1284487470/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-gaspecial?utm_campaign=em17_171212_GASpec_fnd_gq_ful__RC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Cooper&source=em17_171212_GASpec_fnd_gq_ful__RC&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1")
---

Hello,

We saw it in Virginia last month when voters sent a message and elected Democrats up and down the ticket.

We saw it in Georgia last week when Democrats broke the Republican supermajority in the State Senate.

name: Doug Jones
subject: The Democratic Party is back
body:
If we organize in every state like we organized in Alabama, there's no place Democrats can't win. Derek --

Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. said, "The moral arc of the universe is long, but it bends toward justice."

Last night, you helped bend that moral arc a little closer to that justice -- right through the great state of Alabama. I will be forever grateful for your support -- without it, we would have never been able to achieve what many thought was an impossible victory.

Our campaign showed what's possible when you cut through the noise and talk to voters about what matters to them. We made an unprecedented effort to reach out to millions of Alabamians, and we mobilized the grassroots in this state like I've never seen before.

Over the last seven weeks, with the help of the Democratic Party, we made over 1.3 million phone calls, sent over 1 million text messages, and knocked on the doors of 325,000 voters.

If we organize in every state like we organized in Alabama, there's no place Democrats can't win. In fact, we can get started right now.

**Chip in $10 or more, and let's go win more races.**

body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf82/2a380d31/1df7cf3/fe3a34/589111361/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf82/2a380d31/1df7cf3/fe3a34/589111361/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Wow, this is incredible --
Last night, because of YOUR support, Doug Jones defeated Roy Moore and became the first Democrat elected to the Senate from Alabama in over TWO decades.
This victory is no small feat for Democrats. Just over a year ago, Donald Trump won the state by _nearly 30%_ of the vote.
Your activism - and yes, your donations -- sent a very clear message to Steve Bannon, Donald Trump, and Mitch McConnell that their extreme, discriminatory agenda will not be tolerated and that we're here to fight, even when the odds are against us.
Fighting for what is right isn't always easy. It takes grit, integrity, and real commitment.
No one knows what 2018 and 2020 will bring. We DO know that if we keep fighting -- if we keep pouring our hearts and souls into even the toughest races -- we can, as Martin Luther King said, bend the long arc of the moral universe toward justice.
[**Please, will you please stand with Senate Democrats and recommit to the fight by making a gift of just $3 or whatever you can?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf82/2a380d31/1df7cf3/fe3a35/589111361/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN19hbC12aWN0b3J5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNzEyMTNfSm9uZXNXaW5fYWN0IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017_al-victory?refcode=e20171213_JonesWin_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This victory is no small feat for Democrats. Just over a year ago, Donald Trump won the state by nearly 30% of the vote. Your activism - and yes, your donations -- sent a very clear message to Steve Bannon, Donald Trump, and Mitch McConnell that their extreme, discriminatory agenda will not be tolerated and that we're here to fight, even when the odds are against us. Fighting for what is right isn't always easy. It takes grit, integrity, and real commitment. No one knows what 2018 and 2020 will bring. We DO know that if we keep fighting -- if we keep pouring our hearts and souls into even the toughest races -- we can, as Martin Luther King said, bend the long arc of the moral universe toward justice. "" Thank you for everything -- this truly wouldn't be possible without you. -- All of us on Team Maggie ""

As we prepare for the next election cycle, I have decided to support Leah Vukmir for U.S Senate. Leah is my colleague in the Wisconsin State Senate a

Dear friend,

As we prepare for the next election cycle, I have decided to support Leah Vukmir for U.S Senate.

Leah is my colleague in the Wisconsin State Senate and my friend. She has demonstrated strong leadership and passionate courage for the issues that are important to her and to all of us. Leah is never afraid to tell you what she believes and to fight for the best interests of all Wisconsinites.

As a registered nurse, Leah represents the healthcare community as well as women throughout the state with vigor. She is an intelligent, savvy, astute leader who will do the same for all of us in Washington, D.C. She shares our values and we need these values to be represented in the U.S. Senate. Wisconsin needs a strong, positive, effective voice and Leah will speak for us.

Fname, Leah works hard to understand our issues. As her colleague, Leah often turned to me for advice and input about rural issues. Even though she comes from a suburban part of the state, she always seeks more information to fully understand the perspectives of those who will be impacted by the decisions she makes. Leah will work hard to understand and represent rural Wisconsin as a part of the U.S. Senate.

Well, you listened. And thanks to your hard work, **Doug Jones is coming to the United States Senate**. You shocked the nation and sent a message by electing the first Democratic senator from the state of Alabama in a quarter of a century. Every phone call, every door knock, every small dollar donation -- it was the work of folks like you who made this happen.

Peter, our hard work begins again today. If we can win in Alabama, we can win anywhere -- and we can certainly win in Indiana. \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Joe Donnelly**
Subject: Doug Jones can beat Roy Moore

Friend,

My top priority as a Senator is to look out for Hoosiers. But I need partners who will put common-sense ideas above partisanship -- partners like Doug Jones, the Democratic candidate running against Roy Moore in Alabama's Senate race.

I know Doug will work alongside me to fight on the issues that matter to Hoosiers because that's who he is at his core. As the son of a steelworker, Doug understands the value and dignity that comes with a good-paying job. And he spent 20 years of his career fighting for justice -- as a U.S. Attorney, Doug worked to lock away members of the KKK and terrorists for despicable acts of violence.

_Friend, there 's so much at stake in this race._ **Doug 's opponent, Roy Moore, is an extremist with a record of putting political ideology above the rule of la**w.

Doug can beat Moore in Alabama's Senate race -- **polls have shown a tied race**. But he can only win with a surge of support from across the country. **_Will you pitch in a few dollars to help Doug Jones defeat Roy Moore in Alabama 's Senate race?_**

Doug's campaign reminds me a bit of my own in 2012. Talking heads said we didn't stand a chance. But when voters heard the ideas coming from our campaign and the extreme rhetoric from our opponent, the choice was easy.

If our 2012 race and Tuesday's landslide victories across the country have taught us anything, it's that when people put in hard work, good ideas and good candidates win elections.

Let's show my friend Doug Jones that we're the hardest-working campaign in the country. **_Chip in a few dollars to elect Doug and give me a partner to work with in the Senate._**

Thanks for all you do,

Joe

#
Friend,
The FCC is voting Thursday on whether to repeal the "Net Neutrality" rule adopted in 2015.
Three years ago, the FCC passed a landmark rule that prevents internet service providers from favoring some sites over others - slowing down connections or charging customers a fee for streaming or other services. It gave Americans equal access to all the content that's available on the internet - videos, social media, e-commerce sites, etc. - at the same speeds.
But the recently appointed chairman of the Federal Communications Commission, Ajit Pai, wants to abolish **["Net Neutrality," ](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7adc5/bed43eb/3f30103d/75fe811e/3475264920/VEsH/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/why-we-must-protect-net-neutrality")**and give telecommunications giants like Comcast, Verizon, and AT&T the upper hand. His plan would:
1. **Drive up prices for internet service**. Broadband providers could charge customers higher rates to access certain sites, or raise rates for internet companies to reach consumers faster speeds. Either way, these prices hikes would be passed along to you and me.

2. **Give corporate executives free reign** to slow down and censor news or websites that don't match their political agenda, or give preference to their content - for any reason at all.

3. **Stifle innovation**. Cable companies could severely hurt their competitors by blocking specific apps or online services. Small businesses who can't afford to pay higher rates could be squeezed out altogether.

Broadband providers claim that Net Neutrality rules actually hurts consumers because it discourages investment in their networks. Rubbish. Since Net Neutrality was adopted, investment has remained consistent. During calls with investors, telecom executives themselves have even admitted that Net Neutrality hasn't hurt their businesses.
There's still time. Please help stop this corporate power grab over what we can say and do online.
Robert Reich, Founding Fellow, The Sanders Institute

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Fate of the Johnson Amendment soon to be decided
body:
| | We must take a stand on this issue...
---
[ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171213_aja_s1&n=1)
| Dear Peter, Congress will decide the fate of the Johnson Amendment, and it’s critical Christians voice is heard. The House and the Senate passed different tax reform bills. Now the bills go to conference where leaders from the House and the Senate will negotiate the bill differences. There is one item many faith leaders are hoping makes the conference “cuts” and finds a place in the final bill, The Johnson Amendment. According to our My Faith Votes survey, an overwhelming 82% of people support repealing the Johnson Amendment. The 1954 Johnson Amendment was put in place by the then-senator Lyndon Baines Johnson. The amendment prohibited tax-except status to any entity that supported or opposed political candidates. It was an amendment intended to silence a couple of organizations but instead silenced the institution primarily credited with the founding of our nation – the church. [read more](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Ffate-of-the-johnson-amendment-soon-to-be-decided%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171213_aja_s1&n=2) It was an unconstitutional amendment back in 1954, and it remains in violation of the Constitution today. The Johnson Amendment violates the First Amendment of the U.S. Constitution by restricting a pastor’s free speech. The Tax Cut and Reform Bill Conference Committee will now determine if the final bill will finally overturn the Johnson Amendment. Once the conference concludes its work on the bill, the conference report must receive a signature of support by a majority of the House and Senate committee members. The final bill is then voted on by both the House and the Senate before being sent to the President’s desk. [Take a stand with me now](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fp2a.co%2FhcszOK3&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171213_aja_s1&n=3) by sending a note to the conference committee members urging them to keep the removal of the Johnson Amendment in the bill! [Our tool makes this easy and fast!](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fp2a.co%2FhcszOK3&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171213_aja_s1&n=4) We cannot miss this opportunity to return to our Judeo-Christian founding where ministers were not silenced or forced to take a back seat to society’s issues. Instead, it was the ministers who led. By reversing the Johnson Amendment, pastors will be able to exercise their First Amendment Right once again without fear and to boldly apply Biblical principles to the cultural issues of the day in the political sphere – something our nation and our world desperately needs. We must stand united on this amendment if we hope to see America stand strong for God. **United. We Stand.**

Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171213_aja_s1&n=5) [](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fp2a.co%2FhcszOK3&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171213_aja_s1&n=6)
* * *
_My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement focused on motivating Christians in America to participate in local and national elections and be active members of society. By partnering with local churches, pastors, and national faith leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics._
---

[ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171213_aja_s1&n=8) [ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.twitter.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171213_aja_s1&n=9) [ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171213_aja_s1&n=10)

name: Russ Feingold, LegitAction
subject: They still undermined Alabama’s election
body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Friend,

Everyone who did their part to help Doug Jones defeat Roy Moore should
feel justifiably proud of what they helped achieve last night. It was
an incredible victory.

But this victory happened despite numerous barriers to participation
in Tuesday’s election:

* Alabama recently passed one of the nation’s most restrictive voter
ID laws -- and then closed DMVs in heavily African-American areas
of the state. An estimated 118,000 voters lack ID they can use to
vote, and black and Latino voters are twice as likely to lack an
acceptable ID.
* On election day, there were reports of Alabama police checking
voters for outstanding warrants at polling places, which can
intimidate citizens out of voting.
* After Alabama lawmakers reinstated the ability of many former
felons to vote this spring, the secretary of state refused to
undertake normal public education to help newly eligible voters
understand their rights.

This victory showed success is still possible in today’s America when
enough people show up. But that might not be the case for much longer
unless we lock in our rights. That’s why we need to keep building
support for a 21st Century Voting Rights Act that can modernize
standards for fair voting nationwide.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/sign/21st-VRA-em/?t=1002&akid=460%2E356062%2E8SjuMF ]Thousands of Legit members have already added their names in
support of the 21st Century Voting Rights Act. Add your name today.

A modern Voting Rights Act must include certain provisions,
supplemented by state voting rights legislation if necessary, in order
to truly restore legitimacy to our elections:

* Establish an independent Office of Voting Rights, solely to review
and approve any proposed changes to voting rights regulations in
the country.
* Establish a national standard for ID requirements that states
cannot exceed.
* Mandate same-day voter registration.
* Mandate a minimum length of time for early voting.
* Ban any change to voting laws within 90 days of an election.
* Publicize any changes to voting regulations or procedures for a
minimum length of time in multiple languages.
* End felony disenfranchisement, which keeps one in 14 Black
citizens nationwide from voting but only restrict one in 56
non-Black citizens.
* End partisan gerrymandering so that the voters can choose their
officials instead of officials choosing their voters.

Voting is the most important democratic right. Alabama showed last
night that we can still make change when we organize and work
together. But without securing our rights, how long will that hold
true?

[ https://act.legitaction.com/sign/21st-VRA-em/?t=1003&akid=460%2E356062%2E8SjuMF ]Help build momentum for this important new law. Join thousands of
your fellow Legit members by signing the petition to support the 21st
Century Voting Rights Act today.

This could be our generation’s civil rights moment, our 1965, and we
must rise to meet it. We need a 21st Century Voting Rights Act. The
onus is on us to demand one, and on Congress to pass it.

Thank you for standing up for democratic legitimacy today,

Russ Feingold

On election day, there were reports of Alabama police checking voters for outstanding warrants at polling places, which can intimidate citizens out of voting. name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: a great night for America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
We did it!

Last night in Alabama, we witnessed the triumph of dignity over partisanship and decency over Trumpism. The country will not forget that Alabamians voted for hope and moving this country forward, while President Trump sided with a suspected serial child sexual abuser who wanted to drag America backward.

Over the past two months, Doug Jones traveled more than 8,100 miles to meet with Alabamians -- to hear their stories and to share his vision of working to secure good-paying jobs, invest in public schools, and make health care more affordable for struggling Alabama families.

Alabamians responded with a record-breaking turnout to send Doug up to Washington to put his ideas to work for them and our country in the U.S. Senate.

[**They also sent an important message to Democrats and all Americans concerned about the direction of this country. If we can win in Alabama, we can win anywhere. That 's the task before us -- donate now to help replicate last night's victory all over the country in 2018>>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b95/70cdc2ba/46dd5bc9/39025c8/2555405379/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-2018election?refcode=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171213&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+They+also+sent+an+important+message+to+D&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171211&source=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171211")

What makes this victory even sweeter is that the people in the most Republican state in the nation sent a resounding message for common decency and integrity over partisanship.

The voters of Alabama deserve to have their voices heard in the U.S. Senate. And that should begin right now. We must be ready to fight back loudly and strongly if Mitch McConnell doesn't agree to seat Doug Jones before the Senate votes on tax reform.

**Yesterday, Alabama showed us that voters in even the reddest of states will support candidates who want to unite people behind truly American values and who put the public interest over powerful special interests.**

[**We can win back the Senate next year if we dig in and stay the course in every state with a Senate seat up in 2018. Donate here and help ensure we have what it takes to turn this Alabama momentum into a Democratic majority next November >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b95/70cdc2ba/46dd5bc9/39025c9/2555405379/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-2018election?refcode=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171213&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+We+can+win+back+the+Senate+next+year+if+&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171211&source=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171211")

President Trump, Republican Senate candidates, and the Republican National Committee showed us exactly who they are by standing with Roy Moore -- and we will make sure voters do not forget it.

Onward,

Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator

**Here 's the really outrageous part: Republicans are vowing to pass this bill before new Senator-elect Doug Jones can be seated.** They're hoping to force through this disastrous plan while ignoring last night's election results.

Senate Democrats are fighting back and working their hardest to delay this vote until the people of Alabama can have a say -- and they need to know you're with them.
